pr.title: Record: PROTEUS v7 — 11L INT6 + LoRA TTT (mean val_bpb=0.9512, 3 seeds)

output.summary: PROTEUS v7 pairs an 11-layer INT6 transformer with depth-scaled residuals and backward-looking per-document LoRA TTT on fresh copies.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Per-document backward-looking LoRA test-time training adapts exclusively on validation data.
techniques: INT6 uniform quantization with depth-scaled residuals
Backward-looking per-document LoRA TTT on fresh model copies
Chunked multi-epoch eval adaptation with short-doc skip
